name: Potential Hidden File or Directory
notes: This rule triggers when a file or directory attributes are changed or modified to hide artifacts from users.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hiding Files with Attrib.exe, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys
TD_list: APPLY Potential Hidden File or Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Hiding Files with Attrib.exe, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Set Windows System File with Attrib, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Modification of Explorer Hidden Keys
RED_list: Event name: Potential Hidden File or Directory
Event description: Detects when a file or directory attributes are changed or modified to hide artifacts from users.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
